channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Tap n' go: Android's rumored 'Tap to Share' UI might've just broken cover
item.description: Google's still working on Android's "Tap to Share," but new details surfaced, showing what's new and different.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Contacts on a Pixel 6
media:content.media:text: Google Contacts on a Pixel 6
media:content.media:title: Google Contacts on a Pixel 6

item.title: Amazon quietly drops huge sale on noise-cancelling headphones — up to 50% off Sony, Beats, Sennheiser, and more
item.description: Amazon just launched a surprising sale on noise-cancelling headphones, with some brands chopping up to 50% off their bestselling models.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones
media:content.media:text: Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones
media:content.media:title: Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones

item.title: The latest Galaxy Z Flip 8 leak is a boring win for your pockets
item.description: The new Galaxy Z Flip 8 might basically be the same phone as its predecessor, just half a millimeter thinner when folded.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: blue renders of the Galaxy Z Flip 8 showing its back and screen
media:content.media:text: blue renders of the Galaxy Z Flip 8 showing its back and screen
media:content.media:title: blue renders of the Galaxy Z Flip 8 showing its back and screen

item.title: YouTube Premium just got a price hike, and it's not a small one
item.description: The Individual plan now costs $15.99 per month, with Family pricing also increasing.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube app logo on an Android phone
media:content.media:text: YouTube app logo on an Android phone
media:content.media:title: YouTube app logo on an Android phone

item.title: Bold, colorful Moto Edge 70 Pro renders surface, as we await its eventual debut
item.description: Moto Edge 70 Pro renders supposedly leaked online, claiming the device could have several bold, unique colors and textures inbound.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The initial "Hello Moto" setup screen that appears when you first turn on the Motorola Edge 2025
media:content.media:text: The initial "Hello Moto" setup screen that appears when you first turn on the Motorola Edge 2025
media:content.media:title: The initial "Hello Moto" setup screen that appears when you first turn on the Motorola Edge 2025

item.title: Meta's new LLM, Muse Spark, wants to take its AI into a 'people first' era
item.description: Meta announced Muse Spark, its newest LLM that's headed straight for its Meta AI app in the U.S. with smarter, faster responses.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Meta AI introduces the Muse Spark LLM.
media:content.media:text: Meta AI introduces the Muse Spark LLM.
media:content.media:title: Meta AI introduces the Muse Spark LLM.

item.title: Samsung's new A-series phones cost $50 more – but there's a way to get them for cheap
item.description: Samsung’s Galaxy A37 and A57 hit the US with higher prices, but Amazon’s $50 gift card is what really makes them worth a look.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver
media:content.media:text: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver
media:content.media:title: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver

item.title: We asked, you answered: Android users pick between gestures and 3-button navigation, and the top choice might surprise you
item.description: In a recent poll, we asked Android users if they prefer gesture navigation or 3-button navigation. The results are in, and there's a very clear winner.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The gesture navigation bar on the Galaxy S24
media:content.media:text: The gesture navigation bar on the Galaxy S24
media:content.media:title: The gesture navigation bar on the Galaxy S24

item.title: Samsung just made the Galaxy Z Fold 7 more expensive, quietly
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 7 now costs more for 512GB and 1TB variants.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 colors hands-on
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 colors hands-on
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 colors hands-on

item.title: 'Wide' Fold rumors paint an Unpacked launch in late July with Samsung's next wave
item.description: Summer Galaxy Unpacked rumors claimed Samsung will debut the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Flip 8, and the "Wide" Fold late in July.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.
media:content.media:text: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.
media:content.media:title: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

item.title: The best AT&T deals of April 2026 — free Galaxy S26, massive trade-in discounts, and more
item.description: One of the most popular wireless carriers in the country, AT&T is also home to some awesome smartphone deals. We've gathered some of our favorite active offers into this guide.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: AT&T Logo with AC mascot
media:content.media:text: AT&T Logo with AC mascot
media:content.media:title: AT&T Logo with AC mascot

item.title: Galaxy S26 sees high demand, Samsung boosts production as projections are shattered
item.description: Overseas sources alleged that Samsung will increase its Galaxy S26 production in April after previous estimations were broken.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: This new AT&T Prepaid deal lands you a 2026 Motorola phone for only 10 bucks — here's how it works
item.description: The Moto G Play (2026) has arrived, and AT&T Prepaid is already selling the budget phone for a mere $10 when you add a line.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:text: Moto G Play 2026 display outdoors

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 vs. Galaxy A36: Which budget phone should you get?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy A37 is a minor upgrade to the Samsung Galaxy A36, and both remains viable entry options.

item.title: Best Buy is selling this 75-inch Samsung smart TV for only $450: here's what you need to know

item.title: Samsung expands its next big One UI beta update to more devices

item.title: Huawei's FreeBuds Pro 5 convinced me to ditch the Bose QC Ultra Gen 2
item.description: Huawei's FreeBuds Pro 5 combine a fabulous sound with great fit, and they don't cost as much as their Bose and Sony rivals.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Huawei FreeBuds Pro 5 review on Android Central

item.title: I didn't expect to like headphones as much as I love the Nothing Headphone (a)
item.description: Nothing Headphone (a) is a brand new pair of affordable ANC headphones from Nothing, sporting the company's trademark style and high-quality Bluetooth or 3.5mm sound.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Wearing a pair of white Nothing Headphone (a)
media:content.media:text: Wearing a pair of white Nothing Headphone (a)

item.title: I used a $30 cable weight, and it is now my favorite desk accessory
item.description: Native Union's Weighter is an elegant cable weight that's designed to ensure your cables don't slide off your table. Oh, and it costs $30.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: The latest Pixel update tackles Android 16's early stability woes
item.description: Google’s April Pixel update fixes app crashes, missing features, and gaming issues, making Android 16 more stable.

item.title: I talked to Rokid's head of product about Gemini integration and the future of smart glasses
item.description: Rokid is doing interesting things with its smart glasses, so I talked to its head of product to get a better sense of Gemini integration and the broader software ecosystem on the AI Glasses Style.

item.title: Wood you buy it? Moto Razr Ultra 2026 has a pair of alternative finishes in this leak

item.title: T-Mobile will apparently give you a free Pixel phone AND some earbuds this month — here's how to claim yours
item.description: T-Mobile will now give you a free Google Pixel 10a and a pair of Pixel Buds 2a earbuds when you add a line with "most plans" on the carrier's site.

item.title: This stylish Bluetooth speaker has four features you won't find anywhere else
item.description: Teenage Engineering's OB-4 is a Bluetooth speaker with exquisite styling, but that isn't why it stands out. The real reason is that it has plenty of unique features that you don't get anywhere else.

item.title: Podcasts meet Spotify's Prompted Playlists for curious Premium US beta testers

item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Stuffcool made a 65W GaN charger with a retractable cable, and it's pretty good
item.description: Stuffcool's Zeno 65W is a GaN charger with a retractable cable. I used it for just over three months, and it does a great job as a travel charger.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: Google's $135M Android data settlement is getting closer, and you can now set your payout method
item.description: Eligible Android users in the U.S. can now file claims for the ongoing settlement.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: There's no doubt — the OnePlus Nord 6 is the battery champion of 2026
item.description: With a power bank-sized 9,000mAh battery, the Nord 6 lasts two days with ease. Combine that with powerful internals and good software, and you get a great mid-range phone.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: OnePlus Nord 6 review photos

item.title: New Mint Mobile deal gets you a full year of 5G internet AND unlimited wireless for only 45 bucks per month — this isn't a joke

item.title: Galaxy XR's 'key' Android Enterprise update makes it viable in healthcare and retail

item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)

item.title: Ready to ditch cable? This YouTube TV deal just made it easier by slashing $45 OFF your first three months of service

item.title: One company just teased the E Ink phone of my dreams, and it's fully powered by Android

item.title: Motorola heard my plea, and the new Moto G Stylus 2026 might be the affordable Galaxy S26 Ultra we've been waiting for
item.description: Motorola launches the Moto G Stylus 2026, which features an upgraded active stylus pen, a larger battery, a brighter display, and enticing launch bundles.

item.title: I’ve been waiting years for Google Photos to get this one basic feature — and it's finally here

item.description: Pixel users across the board have started reporting issues with the latest March security patch.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central

item.title: I used the Vivo X300 Ultra for a week, and I can't believe a phone camera is this good
item.description: I used the Vivo X300 Ultra as my daily driver, and there's no doubt in my mind that this is the camera phone to beat in 2026. With two 200MP cameras and class-leading video recording, Vivo outdid itself this year.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central

media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central

item.title: The Isai Blue Pixel 10a is a stunning anniversary gift you can’t have
item.description: Google’s Pixel 10a gets a stylish Isai Blue makeover with art-driven features and extras, but it’s locked to Japan.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand

media:content.media:title: limited edition blue for the Pixel 10a held in a woman's hand

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 is a solid phone that desperately needs a camera upgrade
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 is more expensive and offers a bigger screen, but is that enough? Without new cameras or magnetic charging, I'm not sure it is.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in Black in the hand in front of a lake.

item.title: Best Buy is now slashing up to $300 off the Galaxy S26 lineup when you buy unlocked — who needs Amazon?
item.description: Best Buy has quietly begun discounting the Galaxy S26 lineup on its site, no strings attached.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
